title: bromus heterophyllus
intro: Bromus heterophyllus, also known as great brome or ripgut brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus heterophyllus include reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues, as well as helping to manage stress and promote relaxation. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
